\tzpentry{ID3286}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3286 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_M = \int_V \mathbf{A} \cdot \mathbf{B} \, dV - \frac{ \omega_{gyro}}{c^2} \int_V \mathbf{r} \times ( \mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) \, dV \end{equation}
